raw_input:
Parse the structured log line below into JSON. Fields: timestamp (ISO 8601 string preserving the input format), level (string, one of: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, FATAL), service (string), error_type (string — the Exception class name if present, otherwise null), message (string — the human-readable message), fields (object — any key=value pairs found at the end, e.g. account=12345).

Log line:
'2026-04-18T14:02:13.204Z ERROR payments.svc DatabaseTimeout: query exceeded 5s on user_lookup account=10293 retry_count=3'

Return only the JSON object.
success_criteria: fields = {'account': '10293', 'retry_count': '3'} (values as strings is OK, ints also OK)
constraints: error_type is the Exception class name, not the full message
